stages.label: Merge collected env blocks
stages.detail: Merge verify env from current env files and generated seed, data scout, share upload and Filecoin artifacts.

stages.label: Validate production target env contract
stages.command: bun run env:production -- --out=.env.production.local && bun run verify:production
stages.detail: Confirm the final env block binds the deployed profile URL, proof/mode share artifacts and global/friend/season leaderboard scopes.

stages.label: Run final production verification
stages.command: bun run verify:production && bun run doctor:production && bun run goal:audit
stages.detail: Run strict production evidence, operator doctor and original goal audit once every required target env key is filled.
